race.description: Ray White Pakenham & Officer Maiden Plate
race.comment: AVENUE MONTAIGNE (7) switched from a top Sydney yard and looked a run short resuming over 1200m at Sandown-Hillside bet $4.2. Led as favourite at Randwick- Kensington over 1400m at her only second-up outing, beaten 2.2L. Jumps from the inside gate, and quick improvement is on the cards. THERE WERE ROSES (10) resumes and couldn't have been more impressive, beaten a nose over 1500m at Sandown-Hillside three back on debut. Was heavily backed over longer trips at her two starts following. Comes to this with a Cranbourne jumpout win under the saddle, and she has plenty of scope for improvement. BRIGHTLY DANCE (8) missed the frame on debut but then improved, beaten 1.3 lengths over 1312m at Geelong. She led until the shadows of the post, and has the blinkers are applied today. She will use the low barrier and is sure to give a big sight. A gap then to TOP LINER (11), who has been well-prepared for her debut. She may prove the best of the remainder.
